title: Garden Depths
description: Adds new interesting features to Minecraft's Pale Garden.
body:
![[Garden Depths Title1]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4338102b3bcc2d3f29124fcda7323d005bbd3ba.png)

<center> A small mod that aims to expand Minecraft's pale gardens
 
  ---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wvufQedQ9jQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  </center>

  # Features
- Heavy fog while inside the Pale Garden Biome.
- Creakings can now chase players who have the blindness effect applied.
- Carved pumpkins Can be lit and turned to jack o' lanterns using flint and steel, and be unlit using a shovel.

# New Plants
- Pale Pumpkin - Generates all over the pale garden biome.
- Carved Pale Pumpkin - can be carved by shearing a pale pumpkin.
- Pale Jack O' Lantern - can be crafted using a pale pumpkin and a soul torch, are included as a piglin repellant.

- Lily Of The Garden - Generates all over the pale garden biome, opens up at night simillarly to the eyeblossom, though doesn't communicate to other lilies.
- Pale Roots - Can be obtained when a sniffer digs inside of the pale garden. Can be used in order to convert normal pumpkins into pale pumpkins.
- Stern & Tall Stern - Can be ontained when a sniffer digs inside of the pale garden. Has a deep blue color and a round shape, use bone meal on the stern in order to get the tall plant variant.

# Blocks
- Pedestal - A decrative block, can be crafted using chiseled tuff bricks and resin. Emits a redstone signal respective to the Resin Mould statue placed above it, can also transfer the signal to a pedestal block directly below it.
- Resin Mould - A decorative block, can be crafted using resin, and used with multiple items in order to display decorative statues in your world. the list of statues and Items is this:

Diamond/Emerald - Human.

Gunpowder - Creeper.

Slime Ball - Cube.

Red/Brown Mushroom - mushroom.

Resin - Veins.

# Mobs
- Tainted - A zombie variant that spawns inside of the pale garden at night, when a player is hit by the tainted they are given the blindness effect for a few seconds, making them vulnerable to creaking attacks. Drops resin on death.

---
Hope you enjoy your time playing regardless!
